chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SMA No.540 of 2019 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ For hearing of main petition. 26.02.2020 Mr. Blosch Ahmed Junejo, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Farhad Saeed Khan, petitioner/legal heir No.1. Mr. Muhammad Absaar Khan, legal heir No.3. Mr. Ghulam Fareed, witness. Mr. Sajjad Khan, witness. ---------- Agha Faisal J. Per the report of the Deputy Registrar (O.S.) dated 30.01.2020 (“Report”), all requirements in respect hereof have been completed and publication has also been effected, to which no objections have been received. The petitioner/legal heir 1, legal heir 3 and witnesses are present. The presence of legal heir No.2 was dispensed with vide order dated 02.01.2020. Those present reaffirm contents of the petition and the affidavits. In view hereof, it appears that this is a non-contentious matter and there is no impediment to the grant hereof, hence, this petition is allowed. The office is directed to issue letters of administration in respect of the asset identified per the Report, as per the Rules. JUDGE Khuhro/PA
